---
title: 'Keep Believing'
date: '2014-02-01T05:03:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Kaylee Debra Wolfe - Journal'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6217308289741405434'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/keep-believing.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Kaylee Debra Wolfe - Journal/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<p>I'm so sorry for everything you've gone through. Billie is an evil woman. She's lost and doing what she thinks is best... for herself. </p>
